item.title: Medtronic Neuromodulation: Medtronic 1x4 Pocket Adaptor Kit for Deep Brain Stimulation, Model 64001; Stimulator, electrical, implanted, for parkinsonian tremor Recall

item.summary: A limited number of Pocket Adaptor Kits, Model 64001 and 64002, are labeled with incorrect Use-By-Dates. Product details: Medtronic 1x4 Pocket Adaptor Kit for Deep Brain Stimulation, Model 64001; Stimulator, electrical, implanted, for parkinsonian tremor
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide distribution - US Nationwide and The countries of Austria, France, Germany, Italy, Japan, Latvia, Netherlands, Poland, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, United Kingdom.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
